portfolio_gates.label: Circuit breaker clear
portfolio_gates.criterion: Account is above its hard floor — no −20% peak drawdown, −12% breaker, or −4% daily-loss halt tripped.

portfolio_gates.label: Bull regime
portfolio_gates.criterion: Market regime must score BULL (≥ 5.0 of 9.5). CAUTION / BEAR = hold existing positions only, no new entries.

portfolio_gates.label: Entry window open
portfolio_gates.criterion: The cycle's entry-execution window is open (data fresh, market session valid).

candidate_gates.label: On Agent-Watch
candidate_gates.criterion: Discovered by the scanner and not user-blocked.

candidate_gates.label: Eligible (3+ sessions)
candidate_gates.criterion: Has ≥ 3 sessions of history — enough to act on.

candidate_gates.label: Not already held
candidate_gates.criterion: Not already an open position in the portfolio.

candidate_gates.label: Has price + features
candidate_gates.criterion: Price and computed features are present this cycle.

candidate_gates.label: News / earnings clear
candidate_gates.criterion: No negative news catalyst (composite ≥ −6) and not buying into an imminent earnings gap.

candidate_gates.label: ML gate (LONG ≥ 0.50)
candidate_gates.criterion: ML ensemble reads LONG with ≥ 0.50 confidence. — this cycle: 5 passed · 26 not LONG (margin) · 7 under the 0.5 floor · 12 skipped (earnings).

candidate_gates.label: Score ≥ 4
candidate_gates.criterion: Confidence score clears the 4 minimum and sits within sector caps.

candidate_gates.label: Sized (cash / risk OK)
candidate_gates.criterion: Risk/cash sizing yields ≥ 1 share (1.5% risk unit, position ≤ $8,000).

candidate_gates.label: Within 12-position cap
candidate_gates.criterion: Fewer than 12 open positions — otherwise the highest scorer waits for a slot.
